'''âh-s-ch''' ('''kahasach''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wheelspin|wheelspin]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-s-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wheelspin|wheelspin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âh-s-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kahasach
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thihasach|thihasach]] || [[word:jihasach|jihasach]] || [[word:shihasach|shihasach]] || [[word:kihasach|kihasach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuhasach|thuthuhasach]] || [[word:jujuhasach|jujuhasach]] || [[word:shushuhasach|shushuhasach]] || [[word:kukuhasach|kukuhasach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuhasach|thuhasach]] || [[word:juhasach|juhasach]] || [[word:shuhasach|shuhasach]] || [[word:kuhasach|kuhasach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuhasach|thuhasach]] || [[word:juhasach|juhasach]] || [[word:shuhasach|shuhasach]] || [[word:kuhasach|kuhasach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thehasach|thehasach]] || [[word:jehasach|jehasach]] || [[word:shehasach|shehasach]] || [[word:kehasach|kehasach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothohasach|thothohasach]] || [[word:jojohasach|jojohasach]] || [[word:shoshohasach|shoshohasach]] || [[word:kokohasach|kokohasach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thohasach|thohasach]] || [[word:johasach|johasach]] || [[word:shohasach|shohasach]] || [[word:kohasach|kohasach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thohasach|thohasach]] || [[word:johasach|johasach]] || [[word:shohasach|shohasach]] || [[word:kohasach|kohasach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠhasach|thĂŠhasach]] || [[word:jĂŠhasach|jĂŠhasach]] || [[word:shĂŠhasach|shĂŠhasach]] || [[word:kĂŠhasach|kĂŠhasach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathahasach|thathahasach]] || [[word:jajahasach|jajahasach]] || [[word:shashahasach|shashahasach]] || [[word:kakahasach|kakahasach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thahasach|thahasach]] || [[word:jahasach|jahasach]] || [[word:shahasach|shahasach]] || [[word:kahasach|kahasach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thahasach|thahasach]] || [[word:jahasach|jahasach]] || [[word:shahasach|shahasach]] || [[word:kahasach|kahasach]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shahasach|shahasach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshahasach|goshahasach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishahasach|gokishahasach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shahasachnĂŒ|shahasachnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshahasachnknĂŒ|goshahasachnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishahasachnĂŒ|gokishahasachnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shahasachshĂ«|shahasachshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshahasachnkshĂ«|goshahasachnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishahasachshĂ«|gokishahasachshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahasachro|shahasachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahasachnkro|goshahasachnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahasachro|gokishahasachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shahasachmu|shahasachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahasachnkmu|goshahasachnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahasachmu|gokishahasachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shahasachsher|shahasachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshahasachnksher|goshahasachnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishahasachsher|gokishahasachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shahasachng|shahasachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshahasachnkng|goshahasachnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishahasachng|gokishahasachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shahasachya|shahasachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshahasachnkya|goshahasachnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishahasachya|gokishahasachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shahasachyam|shahasachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshahasachnkyam|goshahasachnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishahasachyam|gokishahasachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahasachnĂŒshĂ«|shahasachnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahasachnknĂŒshĂ«|goshahasachnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahasachnĂŒshĂ«|gokishahasachnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahasachnĂŒro|shahasachnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahasachnknĂŒro|goshahasachnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahasachnĂŒro|gokishahasachnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahasachnĂŒmu|shahasachnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahasachnknĂŒmu|goshahasachnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahasachnĂŒmu|gokishahasachnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahasachshĂ«nĂŒ|shahasachshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahasachnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshahasachnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahasachshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishahasachshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahasachshĂ«ro|shahasachshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahasachnkshĂ«ro|goshahasachnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahasachshĂ«ro|gokishahasachshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahasachshĂ«mu|shahasachshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahasachnkshĂ«mu|goshahasachnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahasachshĂ«mu|gokishahasachshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahasachronĂŒ|shahasachronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahasachnkronĂŒ|goshahasachnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahasachronĂŒ|gokishahasachronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahasachroshĂ«|shahasachroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahasachnkroshĂ«|goshahasachnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahasachroshĂ«|gokishahasachroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahasachromu|shahasachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahasachnkromu|goshahasachnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahasachromu|gokishahasachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahasachmunĂŒ|shahasachmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahasachnkmunĂŒ|goshahasachnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahasachmunĂŒ|gokishahasachmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahasachmushĂ«|shahasachmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahasachnkmushĂ«|goshahasachnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahasachmushĂ«|gokishahasachmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahasachmuro|shahasachmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahasachnkmuro|goshahasachnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahasachmuro|gokishahasachmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
